_meta.note: This is the Scalekit-specific placement map. External consumers: copy _template-placement-map.json to <your-docs-repo>/.devex-kit/placement-map.json and fill in your own folders.

cookbook.description: Standalone recipe solving one specific implementation problem. Independently useful.
cookbook.note: No sidebar.config.ts entry needed. starlight-blog auto-lists at /cookbooks/.

quickstart.description: First experience with a product — shortest path to a working result.
quickstart.note: One per product. If one exists, update it rather than creating a variant.

how-to-guide.description: Step-by-step task within a product journey. Uses <Steps>.

concept-page.description: Explains why something works, architecture, mental models. No procedure.

reference.description: Lookup data: API shapes, event schemas, error codes, config options.

integration-guide.description: How to connect a third-party provider with a product feature.
integration-guide.note: Update the relevant integrations index page after adding.
